name: Auroch Minerals Limited
summary: Auroch Minerals Limited explores for and develops mineral properties. It explores for copper, cobalt, nickel, gold, zinc, and lithium ores. The company holds a 100% interest in Arden, Bonaventura, and Torrens East Copper projects that covers an area of approximately 3,700 square kilometers located in South Australia. It also owns a 100% interest in Saints Nickel and Leinster Nickel projects situated in Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Auroch Minerals NL and changed its name to Auroch Minerals Limited in March 2016. Auroch Minerals Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
